title: Gift Card Fraud

narrative: The user seeks detailed information on a specific vulnerability in barcoded gift cards that allows criminals to copy and re-credit cards using smartphones and printers, resulting in financial loss for legitimate users. Relevant documents must explain the exploitation method, the role of barcode-only security, the impact on retailers, and why upgrading to chip or magnetic stripe cards is not widely implemented due to cost.
